title: Soujirou the Willow-Sword
overview: Numerous golems emerge in the city. Amidst the chaos, a swordsman, Soujirou Yagyuu, appears.

title: Alus the Star Runner
overview: A spy comes under attack, and a certain military officer attempts to slay a dragon.

title: Dakai the Magpie and Regnejee the Wings of Sunset
overview: Dakai the Magpie searches for a traitor, while Regnejee searches for a rule-breaker.

title: Nihilo the Vortical Stampede and Kia the World Word
overview: Hidow the Clamp releases a notorious figure, and Elea the Red Tag infiltrates an elf village.

title: Higuare the Pelagic and Nastique the Quiet Singer
overview: Higuare the Pelagic and Shalk the Sound Slicer meet with Taren the Guarded.

title: Gathering of Factions
overview: Soujirou and Yuno are tasked by Hidow the Clamp with a consequential mission.

title: War Commences
overview: Yuno the Distant Talon and Soujirou the Willow-Sword are attacked by deadly assassins from Lithia.

title: The New Demon King War
overview: Yuno the Distant Talon discovers the person responsible for a certain tragedy and vows her revenge.

title: Fire From the Sky
overview: Soujirou encounters a worthy opponent, while Alus the Star Runner gets surrounded by wyverns.

title: Vanishing Calamity
overview: Elea and Kia search for Lana the Moon Tempest, and Dakai confronts Nihilo the Vortical Stampede.

title: When the Sun Sets
overview: Regnejee the Wings of Sunset tries to help Curte of the Fair Skies escape.

title: Shura
overview: The shura head to Aureatia, each with their own motives.

title: Mele the Horizon's Roar
overview: A young boy visits Mele the Horizon's Roar, while Kuuro the Cautious is on the run in Toghie City.

title: Linaris the Obsidian
overview: Kuuro the Cautious searches for a traitor. Elsewhere, Shirok the Sextant meets a beautiful girl.

title: Toroa the Awful and Mestelexil the Box of Desperate Knowledge
overview: Elgite the Ochre Haze sets out to steal enchanted swords while Mestelexil fights another golem.

title: Atrazek the Particle Storm, Part One
overview: Toroa the Awful offers to fight for the Old Kingdom as Kiyazuna the Axle pursues the Particle Storm.

title: Atrazek the Particle Storm, Part Two
overview: Toroa the Awful confronts Mestelexil the Box of Desperate Knowledge as the Particle Storm nears.

title: Rosclay the Absolute
overview: Jelki the Swift Ink grants Gilnes a chance to fight for justice in a duel.

title: Lucnoca the Winter and Psianop the Inexhaustible Stagnation
overview: Harghent the Still and Lagrex the Butchering Landslide seek a dragon. Elsewhere, an ooze appears.

title: Uhak the Silent
overview: Cunodey the Ring Seat, an oracle of the Religious Order, joins an expedition to hunt down an ogre.

title: Kazuki the Black Tone
overview: Yukiharu the Twilight Diver encounters deadly mercenaries. At Okahu, a legendary gunner approaches.

title: Tu the Magic
overview: Rique the Misfortune and Krafnir the Hatch of Truth attempt to find the Demon King's child.

title: Hiroto the Paradox
overview: Yukiharu is targeted by mercenaries and Hiroto the Paradox visits the leader of Okahu.

title: Shiki, Enemy of All
overview: Twenty-one years ago, the First Party confronted the True Demon King. Why did they fail?
